'''NeHimmep''' was a legendary [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Scout/Legends|explorer]], [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]], and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Mirchidi NeMall]] owned a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] named after the Duros, the [[ZH-25 Questor-class light freighter|ZH-25 Questor-class]] [[NeHimmep (freighter)|''NeHimmep'']].<ref name="Stock Ships" />
